content: I’m moving up in the world
Kat will you be hitting lv. 8 soon
Team recommendation with these, and is there something important that i should do? like important copies.
Also do you have more Awakeners after Nymphae?

What's the goal? Story?
Tawil + some combination of Caecus/Nautila/Goliath/Tulu/Celeste
As for missing enlightens just 1 more for Caecus would be nice, but u don't need to run him ~~in theory~~
Wheels: BROWN BROWN BROWN R R R RUN R WHEELS
Put Tawil's wheel on her + To My Dearest Friend SR
THE REST OF UR TEAM RUN R WHEELS!!!
Most important being: Gluttony, Frenzy, Emerge + then its Hope, Greed, flex for the weaker ones
I can easily get 1 more copy for caecus, from the infinite summons
Here are the images of the good r wheels btw
what about the sr, any good from there?

I just finished telling u to run R wheels no less than 3 times.
That wasn't meant to be empty breath, you want to run R wheels
They are pound for pound much more powerful than nearly everything the SRs are doing
yy, i meant if any of the sr are any useful
Just the To My Dearest Friend on ur dps. Everything else is negligible mostly
so something like that as for the 4th it can be goliath/nautila/murphy/celeste, any of these doesn't matter?
With E2 Caecus I would recommend Nautila instead of Tulu, and then the 4th is a flex slot yes
Theoretically the all rounder option is Celeste, while Goliath has niche moments where he's the best
BUT Murphy without e1 do not touch
i can summon to get 1 more coppy for her is it worthy then to put her in the team?
This isn't the "best" team but it's still solid. He just provides less utility than the others.
if i had e1 murphy what would be the best?
With Nautila Caecus + Murphy you would have an extremely strong defensive comp with tawil dps. I personally think that would be ideal for u.
ok, then i will try to get e1 murphy
as for the normal ssr wheels which ones should i farm with the normal summons?

Tulu is lovely but Tawil just isn't the comp for him.
If you like try a Goliath, Tulu, Ramona, Caecus team just for funsies as well
Get that ALL the way up
but i can't put it alongside with tawil's right?
If u have no other SSRs and a +12 Titan's Blade ur already in a strong position.
Trust us and get it up up up

ok i guess i don't really need any more coppies for the standar units for now,  will put everything on that
Oh ya for sure at ur point don't pull on that banner ever again. completely unnecesary
I would need to check stats but generally speaking Tawil wheel would be more consistent
E3 Titan would off a better burst turn.
The hand space is more important
Where E0 Tawil Sig is more constant passive buff
I would say put Blade on Tawil, and her sig on someone else
If u don't have Thais wheel for handsize that is

hmm, so you want me to change tulu with celeste

Since that's basically all he does here is exalt and discard his cards
o yeah she really is E3...

well i really liked tulu for his aoe mobs clear it was super fast

thanks a lot all of you

60% Crit Dmg on Exalt
35% Reduce Cards 1 Arithma

Very Strong Burst Turn

Put it on Murphy, Remove the Wheat on Goliath and go another WoD

And in some cases had keyflare to activate Wings when I didn't have enough Arithmetica for them
It's really not that important to get a keyflare injection after a fight. It's not BAD its just the worst of the browns ur running

Unironically how I play games,
Keep going till it stops working, upgrade, and if it’s STILL not working only then do I ask for help

I just keep bashing my skull in every single angle possible, trying every single upgrade and change, reading every single description, thinking about multiple strategies, thinking about temporary buffs and passive buffs and active buffs, timings and setups for fights, understanding mechanics and move sets. content: Well, I get that many people who are already In late game are probably tired of trying to explain things that are simple for them
But for a newbie is too confusing lol
Which is why I exist. But late game, you will meet them, for I won’t exist
I know cuz I was guiding people through reverse in their discord and reverse is EASY but some people just refuse to read and ask some silly questions like
It's good cuz in many game's it becomes the hell
I know, I was just giving an example of silly questions
I was asking earlier how corrosion works and still don't know exactly
just edge it out the dmg
I guess another problem is some people are taught to fish(how to play and what things do) while others are given the fish(what to play)
And, It has any dot Comp in morimens?
Which is why you can be endgame but end up stuck because you dont fully understand you comp and every Awakeners capabilities
You never push to the limits cause you dont know your full lmits. You lack information.
The conversion of corrosion is simple: 300% real damage, 150% poison, tentacles and counter, bleeding activates it at 300%.
Not something most players are willing to do
Most players are told Leigh is bad trash and horrible character
all i see from Dux is he like to see me suffer
<@645758482305253422> actually knows how to push his Leigh to work effectively
It's normal when they always recommend playing Caro with Thais
Ignoring other people opinions on “Leigh is bad. Leigh is trash. Leigh kills you”.
<@645758482305253422> could only do this because he understands Leigh numbers
He taugth himself how to fish
And didnt just accept whatever others said
True damage? So it has def mathematics for other damages... Nooo...
Is difficult and most players arent willing.
Thats why I am happy that you can be someone that can make Leigh work and reasons that make sense.
So thats why I say ***MOST*** players
What do Tawil and Castor do
Too many things all at once
Try them out in “Trials” in the Banner Screen. “Trials” is in bottom left.
Tawil is in “Chaos”. Castor is in “Ultra”
Do I need the mouse to play Castor
I'll pull for Castor I think
If you understand how he works, go for it
If you just see big numbers, and go “This unit is good” then you will hit a wall eventually
I like the Dark type characters
Thats fine to pull for Aesthetics
Just make sure understand how they function afterwards
Why did I see that...imma cry now...

I would recommend to pull:
Chaos: Nautila/Karen
Aequor: Celeste/Caecus/Goliath/Sanga
Caro: Faint
Ultra: Jenkin/Winkle

Dont forget you have standard selectors, so if you dont wanna pull Caro, but still want Faint, you can just selector her. Then you dont need to RNG on Standard Caro Banner, wasting pulls

For wheels(WoDs), I wouldn’t recommended pulling each characters “Signature Wheel”, but rather wheels that are just best for each role(Dps/Support/Survive)
The No.1 WoD everyone recommends is +12 Titan’s Blade for Dps
The No.1 WoD for Support is +12 Incalculable Favor

Other WoDs you might want are Path Forsaken/Bloody Feast/Chains Unbound/Memory Spiral/Admist The Downpour

^ This is copy and pasted. If there are further questions or adjustments. Feel free to ask <:happy:1356053849894420683>
Or should I use the healer lady
You can run nearly anything at the beginning of the game. For optimization though, Winkle > Tinct, Doll > Lotan
But isnt winkle also a shield
Can i switch ogier to tinct because shes pretty
You can run ANYTHING at the beginning of the game.
If you want optimal, I gave you optimal
Can u explain how the team works
Mainly because you wont understand anything I say
If I say Keyflare equals Posse
Winkle Generates Keyflare for Posse and Aliemus for Exalt
While applying AOE Weakness to enemies with very minor Shielding
As a Support more then a Shielder
Does that make sense to you?
And THATS why explaining is redundant currently. Explore and understand the basics and then come back to ask.
You need a basic grasp of the game before I can teach you further
Hi guys i am running the first four as my current team comp
Is there a better team with my available units
Can you screenshot every Awakener in the box rather then… this weird way…
You mean in the awakener menu
Or you could do it now…
It would help me see the Awakeners you can have instead of seeing “Realm Conflict” with ones greyed out
Do you gravitate towards any certain Archetypes/Mechanics/Realm/Awakeners, so far?
I am very new so dont have any preference
I have been using caeceus cause of his tentacles passive damage and counter
Though not sure if my team composition is any good
Do to what I see, you’re “best” team would be a mix between Aequor(Blue)/Chaos(Yellow).
Is it better to have same realm or combination of two in this game
Do yhese realms work like elemental affinity in other games
Like one is good on another

Offensive Comp: Miryam/24/Murphy/Caecus

Defensive Comp: Caecus/Nautila/Murphy/Miryam
Most teams consist of Two, but there are comps that run only one.

I dont know what “elemental affinity” means, but you do get nerfs or penalties for mixing realms outside of one unless it’s mixing with Chaos(Yellow). Mixing with Chaos only brings upsides and benefits.
Ok i was thinking like pokemon with fire beating grass type scenario
Btw the offensive and defensive team comp you shared how does adding nautila make the comp defensive
Just want to understand how this works

Nautila vs 24. 24 brings more of a burst cause of how Aequor 24 scales with Tentacle Dmg, and Myriam can generate more Tentacles and Tentacle Dmg. Nautila works with Caecus in the sense that, Nautila 3 cost generates more Temporary Counter along with Caecus Perma Counter. Caecus 3 cost makes Counter Proc a additonal time and his Exalt does the same, totaling to three times. Nautila Exalts grants less overall Counter compared to her 3 cost, buts its Permanent. Furthermore Nautila’s Exalt increases your current shield by 50%. Nautila also has inherent large shields due to her base Stats.
Is there a good way to use 24 btw
I only like her 2 cost skill
Dont know how i am using her just  using 2 cost skill when it appears and than tey to use her character bar
24 is one of the more complex Awakeners as she takes different forms depending on which Realm you play her in.
Than she transforms into red and i dont know her skills seems weaker
Right now, you seem to have only used Aequor(Blue) 24.
Cause you mixed her with that realm with your other Awakeners.
So do you want me to break down Blue 24?
No i think this might be long
Can you point me to a guide where i can read it
The one you are using Aequor 24
Every other iteration of her is different from the current 24 you are using.
So basically she is 4 awakeners in one depending on the realm you are using her with? <:takenotes:1357186646294138890> <:flop1:1356083604236800030> <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057>
The e1 e2 e3 are these dupe system in this game?

honestly only her ults differ as far as i know, and maybe the realm passive, do more of a versatile ult than 4 different awakeners which is neat, the different ults match with the realms better usually

With the team comp you mentioned above
You could form another team with Tawil.
Do i need to use any of these items for now or just keep in my inventory for later
Keep them. You know nearly nothing about the game yet(not trying to be rude intentionally).
Yeah thats why i wanted to ask

Hi! Quite new to the game, any suggestions on how to build my team? I’ve been running Tawil, Hameln, Ryker, and Caecus. Also, any suggestions on if I should pull more or specific things to get before anniversary?

Your team is most Aequor Tawil comps, which is solid. I would say grab a copy of Tawil’s Sig “Unseen Wheel”, if you haven’t already. If you can push story with your teams before Anniversary, that would also be very beneficial. One of the events give you free Premium Pulls, and the amount depends on your story progression.
If Castor interests you, then you can go for him and a copy of his wheel as well. He works fine E0 as a Shield/Support/Sub Dps. At E3, he comes a DPS.
By the way, are u able to progress and get those rewards during the anni event itself, or you will only get the pulls depending on your progression before the event?
And rat...when you do even sleep <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057>
Its like a meter bar that fills up
I know my timers and body very well
Is there anywhere to see this bar in game? Or do I have to be farther in the story?
Then you wouldn’t need to pull more, unless your aiming for OE Tawil, or you want Castor.
Is he worth pulling over saving for anniversary? And should I be pulling for more copies of tawil or her wheel?
I assume I’ll be pulling for g doll at the very least and I heard she is quite costly. and gmurphy maybe?

Its complicated. 

If you can progress story, there is no need to pull for your main team which consists of Tawil. If you get stuck, then building your current team, by pulling more, will get you further in the story. Thus netting you more pulls when Anni Event arrives.

On the other hand, if you pull Castor, you have another strong DPS for a endgame mode called D-Tide, which cycles every 2 weeks, and contains endgame materials and pulls.
Do you know why Inferno(GDoll) is good? Furthermore, Fauxborn(GMurphy)’s kit isnt released yet, but we can assume she is gonna be a must pull. Enlightenments or OE unsure.
If you are just following headless into pulling for Inferno(GDoll), then you are either willing to spend alot of money without knowing the reason, or you know she is worth it and the reason why.
Nope 😆 but I guess I decided saving a bit for a couple days as I figure things out (reading headlines, watching guides, asking here) is worth doing before I make decisions
I guess I should go read up on her

Inferno is really good for poison comps, because she basically multiplies poison, applies poison, procs poison. Inferno is also really good because she can solo W3 A5(If you don’t know what this is, then it might be too early for you)with a cheese strategy. All this  are upsides. Downside is to do all of this, she needs OE, which is base 1, plus 8, totaling to 9 copies.
Ah, dang so 9 copies for a cheese strategy and generally being strong
On the other hand, Castor is really strong E3 and another unit during Anni called Kathigua-Ra is really strong E3. The two totaling to 8 copies.
These two dont cheese, and can clear A4 with invest, and a push it further and they can clear A5.
I see your point here. All of these guides and suggestions mostly talk about the one unit, but do these need other secondary units that I won’t have?
Honestly, E3 Castor and E3 Kathigua, you can max both of them to their limits, and have three Support Awakeners semi-built, and they will carry a whole team.
Inferno(GDoll), the cheese only works in W3A5 and for main story clearing, you need to build a poison team to survive, and scale poison further.
Poison team for endgame is expensive, but really strong.
If you have money, then its a free pass for you
Kath and Castor’s teams are versatile, and can use Standard Awakeners. Inferno wants 24, Myriam, Lily and with multiple Enlightenments, including herself.

Obviously have lots to learn and still yet to hit the chap 6 difficulty spike but
First, you would want to fuse your WoDs, as there is no reason to keep duplicates. You can’t run two WoDs on the same team.
Second, your team is severally under leveled if you are at Chapter 6.
Third, I cant see your Skill Lvls and WoDs choices for each Awakener. Who has what?
Fourth, that comp can definitely clear to Chapter 9. If we are talking about the comp and Awakeners if utilized and built properly.

Fifth, there is a settings to turn on when you have a +12 WoD, it auto recycles any further extra copies. Turn that on, and fuse your WoDs to 12. Any extra’s you currently have need to be manually unlocked and sold.

Sixth, this is a Tawil team, which means there are near infinite possibilities filled with RNG. So most situations can be won or survived if RNG is on your side. If you lose, RNG is a factor cause Tawil.
Seventh, this comp has a certain “rhythm” and if you don’t know it, you need to learn it. Due to Ryker, Hameln, existing.
